microsoft_ft: Owned product strategy and execution for Azure's resilience validation **data platform**, scaling a 2-person operation into a self-serve platformized system that sustained 45+ annual drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, partnering with data engineering to define product requirements, scalable data foundations, and self-service scheduling that reduced operational toil by **30%** and shifted execution to a reusable model.

Embedded as the data subject-matter expert within cross-functional squads, translating ambiguous stakeholder questions into scalable, reusable data products and a rack-level drill program delivered in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility in a highly regulated environment, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, improving data trust and reliability for compliance use cases.

Improved time-to-insight and planning cycle time by building an internal **AI agent** and restructuring data workflows, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% while communicating outcomes across technical and non-technical partners.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code-generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across **14 key teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly, improving self-serve tooling and time-to-insight for Azure service teams.

Influenced the product roadmap to add intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, translating complex stakeholder needs into durable, scalable data product capabilities adopted across the org.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and increasing data trust for both technical and business partners.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across **140+ teams**, partnering closely with engineering and analytics stakeholders.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours** of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical data and deployment paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, delivering reliable, well-documented insights that enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support for multiple audiences.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping data dependencies across 1,200+ stations, translating stakeholder needs into a scalable rollout plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives as an embedded PM, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional squads.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** while communicating tradeoffs across technical and non-technical partners.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, building self-serve workflows that improved cycle time.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile against data-driven funnel insights.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, translating ambiguous data into reliable insights that identified and sealed margin leaks for business stakeholders.

tailoring_notes: Relabeled FT role to Product Manager and mirrored JD vocabulary: data platform, data foundations, self-serve, time-to-insight, data trust, embedded PM, reusable data products.
Surfaced fintech/regulated-environment signal via sovereign-cloud + compliance use cases to match the preferred qualification.
Led bullets with data-platform outcomes and data-engineering partnership; emphasized translating ambiguous stakeholder needs into scalable products.
Reprioritized skills toward data models, pipelines, metrics/BI, SQL, and self-serve platforms per the JD.
